student.funding: Parent-funded with bank statements and sponsor letter

places.listingText: Furnished private studio near Downtown Berkeley. Rent $1,850/month. Water and trash $60/month; tenant pays electricity estimated at $70/month. $45 application fee and $1,850 security deposit. Twelve-month lease from August 15, 2026 through August 14, 2027. Direct AC Transit bus to campus, approximately 18 minutes according to the listing.
places.landlordMessages: International students are welcome to apply. Standard screening applies. We have not confirmed whether an SSN is required or whether parent bank statements can replace U.S. credit. Recorded video available; live video tour has not been confirmed.

places.listingText: Furnished private bedroom in a shared three-bedroom apartment. $1,350/month, utilities included. Nine-month lease August 15, 2026 through May 14, 2027. $35 application fee, $250 holding fee credited toward a $1,350 deposit. One direct bus to campus, about 15 minutes according to the listing.
places.landlordMessages: A parent sponsor letter and recent bank statement are accepted instead of U.S. income. No U.S. guarantor required on this route. Current roommates have not yet shared their quiet-hours, guest, or cleaning expectations. Lease excerpt: Electricity is billed separately based on actual household use. Each tenant is jointly responsible for unpaid rent and utility balances owed by any co-tenant.

places.listingText: Private unfurnished studio in Albany. $1,550/month. Water and trash included; electricity estimated at $90/month. $50 application fee, $300 service fee, and $1,550 deposit. Nine-month lease August 15, 2026 through May 14, 2027. Listing estimates 42 minutes to campus with one transfer. In-person and live video tours available.
places.landlordMessages: All applicants without established U.S. credit must provide a U.S.-based guarantor. No alternative has been stated. The listing does not describe the trip home after evening classes. Furniture and setup costs are not provided.
